In re_viewer::external::re_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::re_chunk::external

re_viewer::external::re_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::re_chunk::external

Crate nohash_hasher

Structsยง

  • NoHashHasher
    For an enabled type T, a NoHashHasher<T> implements std::hash::Hasher and uses the value set by one of the write_{u8, u16, u32, u64, usize, i8, i16, i32, i64, isize} methods as its hash output.

Traitsยง

  • IsEnabled
    Types which are safe to use with NoHashHasher.

Type Aliasesยง

  • BuildNoHashHasher
    An alias for BuildHasherDefault for use with NoHashHasher.
  • IntMap
    A HashMap with an integer domain, using NoHashHasher to perform no hashing at all.
  • IntSet
    A HashSet of integers, using NoHashHasher to perform no hashing at all.
